一次邮轮出海宴会，身家千亿的豪门公主--夏玥宁意外坠海，两年音讯全无。集团股权、家族信托基金，围绕千亿遗产的争夺战从未停止。
网传，杀害她的凶手正是她那看似完美的妻子--沈韫一，出生普通的她，靠着迎娶千亿公主，成为夏氏集团掌舵人，而出海前，她们正在闹婚变。
但她们没算到，夏玥宁没死。失忆的她流落东南亚某国，没钱、黑户、语言不通，昔日矜贵的公主，她成了最底层的黑户，艰难求生。两年间，她学会的不仅是生存，还有蛰伏与狠厉。
她该如何找回身世，拿回属于自己的一切？
看似完美的妻子，相爱十年的恋人，是否就是背后的凶手？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o61a74ce27a30e6d8781a8fdc97b87699~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"Alicce","author_id":"","book_id":"7566296597781302296","book_name":"我的在逃大小姐","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7566296821761311256","read_count":"917","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"252320"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"110","tags":"双女主,纯爱,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o61a74ce27a30e6d8781a8fdc97b87699~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303653&x-signature=mmxHIEJAd4f1ADySw0aCYLvpH5A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"80081780296","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"206"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030053FEE217DF51210F14DE08"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10726,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":119},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603596908775015193","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看
